dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The alleyway smells like stale beer and broken dreams. A familiar scent.

dialogue.speaker: BULLY 1
dialogue.line: Look at this loser, still crawling around. Thought you'd learn your lesson yesterday, huh, Yu?

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) My head aches. My ribs ache. Everything aches. It's always like this.

dialogue.speaker: BULLY 2
dialogue.line: He's just asking for another beating. What a pathetic worm.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) My vision blurs. I taste blood. Why do I always freeze? Why can't I just... fight back?

dialogue.speaker: BULLY 1
dialogue.line: Stay down, trash. Don't even think about getting up.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK! CRUNCH!

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) The pain isn't the worst part. It's the helplessness. The absolute, soul-crushing helplessness.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They leave eventually, their laughter echoing as Ijin lies there, a crumpled heap of bruised flesh and shattered pride.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another day, another reminder. This is my life. A punching bag. A background character in everyone else's story.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later, limping through the bustling streets, Ijin tries to disappear into the crowd. But the stares, the whispers... they feel like physical blows.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) If I just had a little strength. Just enough to not be this... weak. Is that too much to ask?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His eyes drift to a faded poster plastered on a utility pole. It depicts two figures locked in a grappling hold, sweat flying.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The text beneath is simple, stark: "Jitae's Gym. Fight Class 3. Learn to fight. Learn to live."

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) Fight Class 3? What even is that? Another place for me to get beaten up?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He glances towards the source of the sound – a grimy building with a heavy, metal door. Through a small, barred window, he catches a glimpse of movement. Shadows grappling, hitting pads.

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 1 (off-screen)
dialogue.line: Damn, that last spar with Jitae-hyung nearly killed me. Fight Class 3 is no joke.

dialogue.speaker: STUDENT 2 (off-screen)
dialogue.line: You think? He barely broke a sweat. But hey, at least we're not like those guys who quit after the first week.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) Quit after the first week... I probably wouldn't even last a day. But...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He looks down at his scraped knuckles, then back at the poster. The words 'Learn to fight. Learn to live.' seem to burn into his mind.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) What if? What if there's a chance? A tiny, impossible chance to change this? To not be this... pathetic?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His hand, trembling slightly, reaches out towards the heavy metal door. He hesitates, fear gripping him. But beneath the fear, a tiny ember of something else sparks.

dialogue.speaker: Ijin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) Even if it just means getting beaten up in a different place... maybe it's better than getting beaten up for nothing.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLENCH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He takes a deep, ragged breath. The decision, though terrifying, feels like the first real choice he's made in a long time.

summary: Ijin Yu, a perpetually bullied and weak student, endures another brutal beating. Desperate for a change, he stumbles upon a flyer for 'Jitae's Gym: Fight Class 3' and, despite his fear, considers taking a terrifying step towards learning to fight.
